title: Italian Midnight Creamy Bitter Risotto
description: A rich and creamy risotto dish infused with the subtle bitterness of cardamom and midnight herbs, perfect for a cozy Italian dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped bitter herbs and sauté until fragrant.
Add the arborio rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with herbs.
Add the warmed broth one cup at a time, stirring continuously and allowing each cup to absorb before adding the next.
After 20 minutes of cooking, stir in the creamy sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the grated parmesan cheese.
Season with ground cardamom and chopped midnight herbs.
